summary: Nicobar Design is a 10-year-old design-driven lifestyle brand with physical stores and likely D2C e-commerce, headquartered in Delhi. The JD reveals an ambition to become AI-native across customer engagement, store operations, and business intelligence.
business_model: Retail (physical stores) and likely D2C e-commerce, selling design-focused lifestyle products (likely home and apparel)
india_presence: Delhi HQ, retail stores across India (implied by 'every store')
positioning_implications: Lead with consumer-facing AI product experience in retail/e-commerce; emphasize design-thinking and business-outcome focus; high-visibility role reporting to CEO.
interview_implications: Expect design-thinking exercises, business-outcome discussions, and likely a case study on personalization or store tooling; UI sensibility may be assessed given the brand's visual nature.
signals_from_jd: 4 product areas (personalization, clienteling, BI, design workflows)
